Hardened first boot and admin bootstrap, a working TURN relay, and a boot-smoke-tested image.

## Fixed

- **First-boot config generation is now guarded.** If generation failed, the old code wrote a stub `homeserver.yaml` and then skipped generation on every later boot — a permanent crash loop until you deleted the stub by hand. A generation failure now halts the container with a clear error instead.
- **Admin bootstrap no longer destroys its own credentials on a transient error.** Any non-"already exists" failure (connection refused, wrong registration shared secret) was treated as success — the admin user was silently never created and never retried. It now only marks itself done on real success or an actual "user exists", and otherwise retries on the next start.
- **TURN relay actually works.** The coturn relay UDP port range is now pinned and exposed (and surfaced in the Unraid template), so relayed voice/video calls flow instead of allocating internally and silently failing.
- **Secret-bearing rendered config** (`homeserver-overrides.yaml`, which holds the Postgres password and TURN secret) is now written `chmod 600`.
- **READY banner** no longer prints on a readiness timeout.

## Added

- **Boot smoke-test gate.** CI boots Synapse against a throwaway PostgreSQL and waits for `/health` before publishing `:latest`.

## Changed

- The Unraid template now lives in the central templates feed; new shared init-log banner.
